name: The Mint Box Studio
focus: Promotional site for Annie Wong — chunky-yarn crochet, knit installations, and small classes
notes: Imagery sourced from themintboxstudio.com (about page slideshow + showcase). Six showcase images were CDN-blocked at static.wixstatic.com for hotlinking; site uses 13 working images. crochet.com.hk's role is promotional only — bookings, shop, and gift cards stay on themintboxstudio.com.
